'''鈭歜-h-d''' ('''kabahad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precertify|precertify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precertify|precertify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabahad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibahad|thibahad]] || [[word:jibahad|jibahad]] || [[word:shibahad|shibahad]] || [[word:kibahad|kibahad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubahad|thuthubahad]] || [[word:jujubahad|jujubahad]] || [[word:shushubahad|shushubahad]] || [[word:kukubahad|kukubahad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubahad|thubahad]] || [[word:jubahad|jubahad]] || [[word:shubahad|shubahad]] || [[word:kubahad|kubahad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubahad|thubahad]] || [[word:jubahad|jubahad]] || [[word:shubahad|shubahad]] || [[word:kubahad|kubahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebahad|thebahad]] || [[word:jebahad|jebahad]] || [[word:shebahad|shebahad]] || [[word:kebahad|kebahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobahad|thothobahad]] || [[word:jojobahad|jojobahad]] || [[word:shoshobahad|shoshobahad]] || [[word:kokobahad|kokobahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobahad|thobahad]] || [[word:jobahad|jobahad]] || [[word:shobahad|shobahad]] || [[word:kobahad|kobahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobahad|thobahad]] || [[word:jobahad|jobahad]] || [[word:shobahad|shobahad]] || [[word:kobahad|kobahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bahad|th忙bahad]] || [[word:j忙bahad|j忙bahad]] || [[word:sh忙bahad|sh忙bahad]] || [[word:k忙bahad|k忙bahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabahad|thathabahad]] || [[word:jajabahad|jajabahad]] || [[word:shashabahad|shashabahad]] || [[word:kakabahad|kakabahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabahad|thabahad]] || [[word:jabahad|jabahad]] || [[word:shabahad|shabahad]] || [[word:kabahad|kabahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabahad|thabahad]] || [[word:jabahad|jabahad]] || [[word:shabahad|shabahad]] || [[word:kabahad|kabahad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabahad|shabahad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabahad|goshabahad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabahad|gokishabahad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabahadn眉|shabahadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabahadnkn眉|goshabahadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahadn眉|gokishabahadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabahadsh毛|shabahadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabahadnksh毛|goshabahadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabahadsh毛|gokishabahadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahadro|shabahadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahadnkro|goshabahadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahadro|gokishabahadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahadmu|shabahadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahadnkmu|goshabahadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahadmu|gokishabahadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabahadsher|shabahadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabahadnksher|goshabahadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabahadsher|gokishabahadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabahadng|shabahadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabahadnkng|goshabahadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabahadng|gokishabahadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabahadya|shabahadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabahadnkya|goshabahadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabahadya|gokishabahadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabahadyam|shabahadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabahadnkyam|goshabahadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabahadyam|gokishabahadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahadn眉sh毛|shabahadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahadnkn眉sh毛|goshabahadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahadn眉sh毛|gokishabahadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahadn眉ro|shabahadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahadnkn眉ro|goshabahadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahadn眉ro|gokishabahadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahadn眉mu|shabahadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahadnkn眉mu|goshabahadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahadn眉mu|gokishabahadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahadsh毛n眉|shabahadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahadnksh毛n眉|goshabahadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahadsh毛n眉|gokishabahadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahadsh毛ro|shabahadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahadnksh毛ro|goshabahadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahadsh毛ro|gokishabahadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahadsh毛mu|shabahadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahadnksh毛mu|goshabahadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahadsh毛mu|gokishabahadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahadron眉|shabahadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahadnkron眉|goshabahadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahadron眉|gokishabahadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahadrosh毛|shabahadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahadnkrosh毛|goshabahadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahadrosh毛|gokishabahadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahadromu|shabahadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahadnkromu|goshabahadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahadromu|gokishabahadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahadmun眉|shabahadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahadnkmun眉|goshabahadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahadmun眉|gokishabahadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahadmush毛|shabahadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahadnkmush毛|goshabahadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahadmush毛|gokishabahadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahadmuro|shabahadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahadnkmuro|goshabahadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahadmuro|gokishabahadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
